notes: Exclude decision: airlineops layout_verify.py validates a domain-specific tree_layout.json schema that does not exist in gzkit; gzkit's config_paths.py + validate_pkg/manifest.py is already a functional superset with AST source-literal scanning and control-surface type checks that airlineops lacks; airlineops still uses the retired _repo_root_from_here() anti-pattern gzkit removed in OBPI-0.0.7-04; no narrow robustness feature warrants narrow absorption (contrast OBPI-27's _safe_print case). Documentation-only decision, no code or test edits.
